medtronic advisa.device_name: Medtronic Advisa DR MRI SureScan Pacemaker
medtronic advisa.sar_limit: Whole body SAR <= 2.0 W/kg (Normal Operating Mode)
medtronic advisa.conditions:
1. SureScan mode must be programmed ON prior to the scan.
2. No abandoned leads or lead fragments present.
3. Active lead impedance must be within 200 to 1500 ohms.
4. Patient must be monitored continuously (ECG or Pulse Oximetry).
medtronic advisa.recalls_adverse_events: No active recalls. 4 minor lead impedance fluctuations reported in MAUDE database (non-serious).

st. jude medical ellipse.device_name: St. Jude Medical Ellipse ICD (Implantable Cardioverter Defibrillator)
st. jude medical ellipse.conditions:
1. Device must be placed in MRI mode (tachyarrhythmia therapy programmed OFF).
2. Patient must not have abandoned leads, adapters, or lead extenders.
3. Minimum post-implant duration of 6 weeks required.
st. jude medical ellipse.recalls_adverse_events: Recall in 2018 regarding battery depletion issues (resolved). Check patient serial number.

cochlear nucleus 7.sar_limit: Head SAR <= 3.2 W/kg (or Whole body SAR <= 2.0 W/kg)
cochlear nucleus 7.conditions:
1. External sound processor MUST be removed prior to entering the MRI scanner room.
2. Splint/bandage kit must be applied over the implant site for CI500 series at 3.0T to prevent magnet displacement.
3. CI600 series is conditional at 1.5T/3.0T without magnet removal or splinting.
cochlear nucleus 7.recalls_adverse_events: None active. Rare cases of demagnetization reported if splinting protocols were ignored.

aneurx stent graft.sar_limit: Whole body SAR <= 2.0 W/kg for 15 minutes of continuous scanning
aneurx stent graft.conditions:
1. Safe to scan immediately after implantation (no wait period required).
2. Non-ferromagnetic nitinol/polyester construction.
aneurx stent graft.recalls_adverse_events: No active recalls. Historical migration events noted in early 2000s; verify graft position prior to scan.

star edwards valve.sar_limit: No specific SAR limits (non-ferromagnetic clinical models)
star edwards valve.conditions:
1. Models 6120 (mitral) and 6000 (aortic) are constructed of Stellite and titanium and are safe to scan.
2. Note: Early caged-ball valves from the 1960s containing stainless steel (e.g. Model 1000) are MRI Unsafe. Confirm model number.

mirena.sar_limit: Whole body SAR <= 2.0 W/kg (Verify in manual)
mirena.conditions:
1. Safety status and constraints must be verified in the official user manual.
2. Ensure the patient's device model matches specifications prior to scan.
mirena.recalls_adverse_events: No active recalls or adverse events extracted from safety manual corpus.
